title: oreocharis ovata
intro: Oreocharis ovata, also known as the 'Golden Dragon Flower', is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in its roots, which are said to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Oreocharis ovata have been associated with various health benefits, including its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the roots of Oreocharis ovata are often dried and used in decoctions or infusions, while the leaves and flowers are sometimes used in teas and tinctures.
